negative_variants.description: Kcl Capacitor Ddt Current: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
Kcl Capacitor Ddt Current: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
Kcl Capacitor Ddt Current: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
Kcl Capacitor Ddt Current: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
Kcl Capacitor Ddt Current: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
